The Granite Hall

The Salt Guild kept its offices in a granite hall above the ﬁsh market of Port Saffron. Mira Vale waited on a bench while the clerks argued behind tall doors. Captain Elias Thorn came out an hour later with empty hands. "Confiscated," Elias Thorn said. "Every crate." Mira Vale looked at the granite hall for a long moment. Then Mira Vale whispered the beginning of a plan, and Elias Thorn laughed for the first time in days.
